TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Thanasis_Antetokounmpo, title = Thanasis_Antetokounmpo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thanasis_Antetokounmpo} }

S.FORM: Thanasis Antetokounmpo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 7, Thanasis Antetokounmpo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Thanasis Antetokounmpo hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 7, Thanasis Antetokounmpo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tħanas~ɕis~ɕ antetokounmpo ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tħanas~ɕis~ɕ antetokounmpo, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
